title: Flexbox Fundamentals
description: Use flexbox to create a responsive card layout with evenly spaced items that wrap to new rows

validationRules.message: The card grid should use flexbox display
The flex container should wrap items
The gap between cards should be 16px

hints.text: Flexbox is a one-dimensional layout method. Set the parent to display: flex and control wrapping behavior.
The container needs 'display: flex', 'flex-wrap: wrap', and 'gap: 16px'. Each card needs a fixed width and padding.
.card-grid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 16px; } .card { width: 200px; padding: 16px; }
